name: Full Demo Walkthrough
description: Calm hero + offer badge → a REQUIRED full-screen app-UI sequence (~40% of runtime, the longest product-shot share of any format) → a CTA pill that fades in AND out (unique to this format). No logo grid — university crests only appear inside the product demo.
defaultProofLine: A structured shortlist makes the journey clearer

questions.prompt: Offer wordmark badge text (e.g. "NEW ZEALAND Masters")
Path to this campaign's own app screen-recording (REQUIRED for this format — never a reference clip)
